{{Quote|All right partner! Let's take this droid and see what it can do!|Cammy|<ref name="Star Wars: DroidWorks">''[[Star Wars: DroidWorks]]''</ref>}}
'''Holocam E'''-series [[Cam droid/Legends|cam droids]] were a series of small, friendly [[Holocamera/Legends|holocam]] [[Droid/Legends|droids]], programmed with a [[Gender/Legends|female]] personality and seemingly at least basic level mechanical, technical, and scientific knowledge. Produced by [[Trang Robotics]], Holocam E droids cheerfully dispensed advice and helpful hints as they became relevant.

One of these droids, known as "[[Cammy]]," helped a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Unidentified Rebel agent (assassin droid factory)|agent]] to find and [[Infiltration of an assassin droid factory|infiltrate]] an [[Unidentified Imperial assassin droid|assassin droid]] [[Unidentified Tatooine assassin droid factory|factory]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].

{{Droid-stub}}
